mapper.sql: id, user_id, product_id, seckill_price, status, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seckill_order (user_id, product_id, seckill_price, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{seckillPrice}, #{status})
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM seckill_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
